'''ngashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zootomically|zootomically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zootomically|zootomically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngashate|ngashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngashatesher|ngashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashatesherĂ«m|ngashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngashatero|ngashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngashateshĂ«|ngashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashateshĂ«m|ngashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingashatero|gokingashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingashateshĂ«|gokingashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingashateshĂ«m|gokingashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongashankerom|gongashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongashankeshĂ«|gongashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongashankeshĂ«m|gongashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongashankeya|gongashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngashaterom|ngashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashatemu|ngashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngashateya|ngashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingashaterom|gokingashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingashatemu|gokingashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingashateya|gokingashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngashashate|ngashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngashashatesher|ngashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashashatesherĂ«m|ngashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngashashatero|ngashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngashashateshĂ«|ngashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashashateshĂ«m|ngashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingashashatero|gokingashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingashashateshĂ«|gokingashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingashashateshĂ«m|gokingashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongashashankerom|gongashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongashashankeshĂ«|gongashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongashashankeshĂ«m|gongashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongashashankeya|gongashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngashashaterom|ngashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngashashatemu|ngashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngashashateya|ngashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingashashaterom|gokingashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingashashatemu|gokingashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingashashateya|gokingashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠte|ngĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠtesher|ngĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠtero|ngĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠtero|gokingĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠterom|ngĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠtemu|ngĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠshĂŠteya|ngĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠterom|gokingĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠshĂŠteya|gokingĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafshafte|ngafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafshaftesher|ngafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafshaftesherĂ«m|ngafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafshaftero|ngafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafshafteshĂ«|ngafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafshafteshĂ«m|ngafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafshaftero|gokingafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafshafteshĂ«|gokingafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafshafteshĂ«m|gokingafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafshafnkerom|gongafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafshafnkeshĂ«|gongafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafshafnkeshĂ«m|gongafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafshafnkeya|gongafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafshafterom|ngafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafshaftemu|ngafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafshafteya|ngafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafshafterom|gokingafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafshaftemu|gokingafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafshafteya|gokingafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
